title: Deploy OpenClaw to the Cloud in SECONDS - No Server Management Required
description:
Deploy OpenClaw to the cloud in SECONDS with Kimi Claw—no server management, no VPS, no dedicated hardware. In this demo, you’ll see how to spin up a hosted OpenClaw instance with zero configuration, 24/7 uptime, and 40 GB of storage per deployment. You’ll also get instant access to over 5,000 skills via the ClawHub marketplace and learn how Kimi Claw integrates directly with the Kimi Bot platform.

What you’ll learn:
- How to deploy OpenClaw to the cloud in seconds using Kimi Claw
- Why zero-configuration hosting eliminates server setup, scaling, and maintenance
- How to leverage 24/7 uptime and 40 GB of storage per deployment
- How the ClawHub marketplace unlocks 5,000+ skills for automation and AI workflows
- How to connect your OpenClaw instance to the Kimi Bot platform
- A free comparison of AI-powered Excel tools, highlighting pros and cons to help you choose the right assistant for your data tasks
- Best practices for secure, reliable cloud deployments without managing VPS or dedicated hardware

Perfect for developers, automation engineers, data analysts, and small teams who want production-ready OpenClaw hosting without DevOps overhead. Kimi Claw handles the infrastructure so you can focus on building workflows, connecting APIs, and shipping value.

Timestamps:
0:00 Intro — what is Kimi Claw?
1:15 One-click deployment demo
3:10 24/7 uptime and 40 GB storage overview
4:20 ClawHub marketplace: 5,000+ skills
6:00 Kimi Bot integration walkthrough
7:30 AI Excel tools comparison: pros and cons
9:15 Security, scaling, and maintenance
10:40 Wrap-up and next steps

Try it free today and deploy in seconds. Subscribe for more OpenClaw and Kimi Claw tutorials, automation tips, and AI tool comparisons.
